weinbergerlab <dweinber@gmail.com>
danweinberger <daniel.weinberger@yale.edu>
message: update metadata for bundles and for census
update standard files and modify prefixes on the variables

author: danweinberger <daniel.weinberger@yale.edu>
weinbergerlab <dweinber@gmail.com>
danweinberger <daniel.weinberger@yale.edu>
message: update metadata for bundles and for census
update standard files and modify prefixes on the variables

acs_AGE.short_description: Median age of the total population.
acs_AGE.long_description: The median age of all residents in a given geography, derived from ACS Table B01002. This is a commonly used summary statistic for the age structure of a population.
acs_AGE.statement: In {location}, the median age is {value} years.

acs_BDB.short_description: Share of households with a broadband internet subscription.
acs_BDB.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that have a broadband (high-speed) internet subscription, derived from ACS Table B28002. Includes cable, fiber, DSL, satellite, and fixed wireless connections.
acs_BDB.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have a broadband internet subscription.

acs_BTH.short_description: Share of women aged 15–50 who gave birth in the past 12 months.
acs_BTH.long_description: Proportion of women aged 15–50 years who gave birth in the past 12 months, derived from ACS Table B13002. Used as an approximation of the general fertility rate.
acs_BTH.statement: In {location}, {value} of women aged 15–50 gave birth in the past year.

acs_DCY.long_name: Opportunity Youth Rate (Ages 16–24, Not in School or Work)
acs_DCY.short_description: Share of youth aged 16–24 who are neither enrolled in school nor employed.
acs_DCY.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 16–24 who are not enrolled in school and not employed (sometimes called 'disconnected youth' or 'opportunity youth'), derived from ACS Table B14005.
acs_DCY.statement: In {location}, {value} of youth aged 16–24 are neither in school nor employed.

acs_EDB.short_description: Share of adults aged 25+ who have at least a high school diploma or equivalent.
acs_EDB.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 25 and older who have completed high school (including equivalency), derived from ACS Table B15002. Includes all levels of educational attainment at or above high school.
acs_EDB.statement: In {location}, {value} of adults aged 25+ have at least a high school diploma.

acs_EDC.short_description: Share of adults aged 25+ who have attended any college or higher.
acs_EDC.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 25 and older who have some college, an associate degree, a bachelor's degree, or a graduate/professional degree, derived from ACS Table B15002.
acs_EDC.statement: In {location}, {value} of adults aged 25+ have attended college or obtained a higher degree.

acs_GNI.short_description: Measure of household income inequality (0=perfect equality, 1=maximum inequality).
acs_GNI.long_description: The Gini index measures the degree of income inequality among households, derived from ACS Table B19083. A value of 0 represents perfect equality; 1 represents maximum inequality. The ACS Gini is based on household income.
acs_GNI.statement: In {location}, the Gini index of income inequality is {value}.

acs_GRP.short_description: Share of the total population living in group quarters (prisons, dorms, nursing homes, etc.).
acs_GRP.long_description: Proportion of the total population residing in group quarters (e.g., correctional facilities, college dormitories, nursing facilities, military barracks), derived from ACS Tables B26001 and B01001.
acs_GRP.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives in group quarters.

acs_HBS.long_name: Severe Housing Cost Burden Rate (Spending 50%+ of Income on Housing)
acs_HBS.short_description: Share of households spending 50% or more of income on housing costs.
acs_HBS.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units where gross housing costs (rent or owner costs) exceed 50% of household income, derived from ACS Tables B25070 (renters) and B25091 (owners). Severe cost burden is a standard HUD threshold indicating serious housing affordability stress.
acs_HBS.statement: In {location}, {value} of households are severely cost-burdened, spending 50%+ of income on housing.

acs_HBU.long_name: Housing Cost Burden Rate (Spending 30%+ of Income on Housing)
acs_HBU.short_description: Share of households spending 30% or more of income on housing costs.
acs_HBU.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units where gross housing costs (rent or owner costs) exceed 30% of household income, derived from ACS Tables B25070 (renters) and B25091 (owners). Cost burden at 30% is the standard HUD threshold indicating housing affordability stress.
acs_HBU.statement: In {location}, {value} of households are cost-burdened, spending 30%+ of income on housing.

acs_POP.long_description: Total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_M.short_description: Total count of males in the population.
acs_POP_M.long_description: Count of males in the total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_F.short_description: Total count of females in the population.
acs_POP_F.long_description: Count of females in the total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_I.short_description: Total count of infants aged 0–4 years.
acs_POP_I.long_description: Count of children aged 0–4 years (infants and toddlers) in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_I.statement: In {location}, there are {value} children aged 0–4 years.

acs_POP_J.short_description: Total count of children and adolescents aged 5–17 years.
acs_POP_J.long_description: Count of children and adolescents aged 5–17 years (school-age youth) in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_J.statement: In {location}, there are {value} youth aged 5–17 years.

acs_POP_Y.short_description: Total count of young adults aged 18–39 years.
acs_POP_Y.long_description: Count of young adults aged 18–39 years in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_Y.statement: In {location}, there are {value} young adults aged 18–39 years.

acs_POP_O.short_description: Total count of middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years.
acs_POP_O.long_description: Count of middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_O.statement: In {location}, there are {value} middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years.

acs_POP_S.short_description: Total count of seniors aged 65 years and older.
acs_POP_S.long_description: Count of older adults aged 65 years and older in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_S.statement: In {location}, there are {value} seniors aged 65 and older.

acs_PCT_M.short_description: Proportion of the population that is male.
acs_PCT_M.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as male, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_M.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is male.

acs_PCT_F.short_description: Proportion of the population that is female.
acs_PCT_F.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as female, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_F.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is female.

acs_PCT_I.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 0–4 years.
acs_PCT_I.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 0–4 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_I.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 0–4 years.

acs_PCT_J.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 5–17 years.
acs_PCT_J.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 5–17 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_J.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 5–17 years.

acs_PCT_Y.short_name: Young adult share of population (18–39 years)
acs_PCT_Y.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 18–39 years.
acs_PCT_Y.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 18–39 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_Y.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 18–39 years.

acs_PCT_O.short_name: Middle-aged adult share of population (40–64 years)
acs_PCT_O.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 40–64 years.
acs_PCT_O.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 40–64 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_O.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 40–64 years.

acs_PCT_S.long_name: Share of Population Aged 65 and Older (Seniors)
acs_PCT_S.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 65 years and older.
acs_PCT_S.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 65 years and older, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_S.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 65 and older.

acs_DEP.short_description: Ratio of dependents (ages 0–17 and 65+) to working-age adults (ages 18–64).
acs_DEP.long_description: Ratio of the combined count of young (0–17 years) and older (65+) dependents to the working-age population (18–64 years), derived from ACS Table B01001. A higher ratio indicates a greater relative burden on the working-age population.
acs_DEP.statement: In {location}, there are {value} dependents for every working-age adult.

acs_POP_W.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic White alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_W.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic White residents.

acs_POP_B.long_name: Non-Hispanic Black or African American Population
acs_POP_B.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic Black or African American residents.
acs_POP_B.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Black or African American alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_B.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Black or African American residents.

acs_POP_A.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Asian alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_A.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Asian residents.

acs_POP_H.short_description: Count of Hispanic or Latino residents of any race.
acs_POP_H.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Hispanic or Latino of any race, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_H.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Hispanic or Latino residents.

acs_POP_P.long_name: Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native Population
acs_POP_P.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native residents.
acs_POP_P.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_P.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native residents.

acs_POP_P1.long_name: Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander Population
acs_POP_P1.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander residents.
acs_POP_P1.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_P1.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander residents.

acs_POP_Q.long_name: Non-Hispanic Two or More Races Population
acs_POP_Q.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic residents identifying as two or more races.
acs_POP_Q.long_description: Count of residents who identify as Non-Hispanic and of two or more races, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_Q.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic residents identifying as two or more races.

acs_PCT_W.long_name: Non-Hispanic White Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_W.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic White.
acs_PCT_W.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic White alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_W.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic White.

acs_PCT_B.long_name: Non-Hispanic Black or African American Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_B.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Black or African American.
acs_PCT_B.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Black or African American alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_B.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Black or African American.

acs_PCT_A.long_name: Non-Hispanic Asian Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_A.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Asian.
acs_PCT_A.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Asian alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_A.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Asian.

acs_PCT_H.long_name: Hispanic or Latino Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_H.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Hispanic or Latino.
acs_PCT_H.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Hispanic or Latino of any race, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_H.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Hispanic or Latino.

acs_PCT_P.long_name: Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_P.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native.
acs_PCT_P.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_P.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native.

acs_PCT_P1.long_name: Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_P1.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander.
acs_PCT_P1.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_P1.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander.

acs_PCT_Q.long_name: Non-Hispanic Two or More Races Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_Q.short_description: Proportion of the population identifying as Non-Hispanic two or more races.
acs_PCT_Q.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic and of two or more races, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_Q.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population identifies as Non-Hispanic two or more races.

acs_REX.short_description: Probability that two randomly chosen residents are from different racial/ethnic groups (0=no diversity, ~1=maximum diversity).
acs_REX.long_description: Herfindahl-based diversity index computed as 1 minus the sum of squared race/ethnicity shares across seven groups (Non-Hispanic White, Black, Asian, Hispanic, Native American, Pacific Islander, Two or more races), derived from ACS Table B03002. A value near 0 means nearly all residents share one group; a value near 1 means population is evenly distributed across all groups.
acs_REX.statement: In {location}, the race-ethnicity diversity index is {value}.

acs_HTA.short_description: Share of family households headed by a single parent with children.
acs_HTA.long_description: Proportion of family households that are headed by a single parent (male or female householder, no spouse present) with children under 18, derived from ACS Table B11012.
acs_HTA.statement: In {location}, {value} of family households are headed by a single parent.

acs_HTJ.long_name: Crowded Housing Rate (More Than 1 Person per Room)
acs_HTJ.short_description: Share of occupied housing units with more than 1 person per room.
acs_HTJ.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with more than 1 person per room (a standard indicator of housing crowding), derived from ACS Table B25014.
acs_HTJ.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are crowded (more than 1 person per room).

acs_HUF.long_name: Rate of Housing Units Lacking Complete Plumbing Facilities
acs_HUF.short_description: Share of housing units without complete indoor plumbing.
acs_HUF.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that lack complete plumbing facilities (hot and cold running water, a bathtub or shower, and a flush toilet), derived from ACS Table B25048.
acs_HUF.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units lack complete plumbing facilities.

acs_HUG.long_name: Rate of Occupied Housing Units Without Telephone Service
acs_HUG.short_description: Share of occupied housing units without telephone service.
acs_HUG.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with no telephone service available (neither landline nor cellular), derived from ACS Table B25043.
acs_HUG.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have no telephone service.

acs_HUN.short_description: Share of housing units that are mobile homes or trailers.
acs_HUN.long_description: Proportion of all housing units that are mobile homes, manufactured homes, or trailers, derived from ACS Table B25024.
acs_HUN.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are mobile homes.

acs_HUO.short_description: Share of occupied housing units that are owner-occupied.
acs_HUO.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that are owner-occupied (homeownership rate), derived from ACS Table B25003.
acs_HUO.statement: In {location}, {value} of occupied housing units are owner-occupied.

acs_POV.short_description: Share of the population with income below the federal poverty level.
acs_POV.long_description: Proportion of the population with family income below the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table B17001.
acs_POV.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives below the poverty level.

acs_PUB.short_description: Share of workers who commute primarily by public transportation.
acs_PUB.long_description: Proportion of workers aged 16 and older who use public transportation (excluding taxicab) as their primary means of commuting to work, derived from ACS Table B08301.
acs_PUB.statement: In {location}, {value} of workers commute primarily by public transportation.

acs_PVA.long_name: Deep Poverty Rate (Below 50% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVA.short_description: Share of the population with income below 50% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVA.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 50% of the federal poverty threshold (deep poverty), derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVA.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is in deep poverty (below 50% of the poverty level).

acs_PVB.long_name: Near-Poverty Rate (Below 150% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVB.short_description: Share of the population with income below 150% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVB.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 150% of the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVB.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has income below 150% of the poverty level.

acs_PVC.long_name: Low-Income Rate (Below 200% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVC.short_description: Share of the population with income below 200% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVC.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 200% of the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVC.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has income below 200% of the poverty level.

acs_SNP.short_description: Share of households receiving SNAP (food stamp) benefits.
acs_SNP.long_description: Proportion of households that received Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP, formerly food stamps) benefits in the past 12 months, derived from ACS Table B22003.
acs_SNP.statement: In {location}, {value} of households receive SNAP benefits.

acs_VAL.short_description: Median value of owner-occupied housing units in dollars.
acs_VAL.long_description: Median self-reported value of owner-occupied housing units in current dollars, derived from ACS Table B25077.
acs_VAL.statement: In {location}, the median home value is ${value}.

acs_WWN.long_name: Rate of Households Without Internet Access
acs_WWN.short_description: Share of households without any internet access.
acs_WWN.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with no internet subscription of any kind, derived from ACS Table B28002.
acs_WWN.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have no internet access.

acs_INB.long_name: Median Earnings for Full-Time, Year-Round Workers
acs_INB.short_description: Median earnings for full-time, year-round workers in dollars.
acs_INB.long_description: Median earnings for full-time, year-round civilian workers aged 16 and older in current dollars, derived from ACS Table B20017.
acs_INB.statement: In {location}, the median earnings for workers is ${value}.

acs_INC.short_description: Median household income in the past 12 months in dollars.
acs_INC.long_description: Median household income in current dollars, including all sources of income for all household members, derived from ACS Table B19013.
acs_INC.statement: In {location}, the median household income is ${value}.

acs_PCI.short_description: Mean income per person in dollars.
acs_PCI.long_description: Per capita income computed by dividing total aggregate income by the total population, derived from ACS Table B19301.
acs_PCI.statement: In {location}, the per capita income is ${value}.

acs_INL.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Lowest (First) Quintile
acs_INL.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the lowest 20% of households.
acs_INL.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the lowest income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INL.statement: In {location}, the lowest income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INM.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Second Quintile
acs_INM.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the second 20% of households.
acs_INM.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the second income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INM.statement: In {location}, the second income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INN.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Third Quintile
acs_INN.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the middle 20% of households.
acs_INN.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the third (middle) income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INN.statement: In {location}, the middle income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INO.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Fourth Quintile
acs_INO.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the fourth 20% of households.
acs_INO.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the fourth income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INO.statement: In {location}, the fourth income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INP.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Highest (Fifth) Quintile
acs_INP.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the highest 20% of households.
acs_INP.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the highest income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INP.statement: In {location}, the highest income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INQ.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Top 5%
acs_INQ.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the top 5% of households.
acs_INQ.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the top 5%, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INQ.statement: In {location}, the top 5% of households receive {value} of total income.

acs_OWS.short_description: Ratio of income share of the top 20% to the bottom 20% of households.
acs_OWS.long_description: The S80/S20 ratio is computed as the share of aggregate income held by the top quintile divided by the share held by the lowest quintile, derived from ACS Table B19081. A higher ratio indicates greater income inequality.
acs_OWS.statement: In {location}, the income quintile share ratio (S80/S20) is {value}.

acs_LEQ.short_description: Share of the population aged 5+ who speak English less than 'very well'.
acs_LEQ.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 5 and older who speak a language other than English at home and speak English less than 'very well' (limited English proficiency), derived from ACS Table B16004.
acs_LEQ.statement: In {location}, {value} of residents aged 5+ have limited English proficiency.

acs_UNS.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population without health insurance.
acs_UNS.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with no health insurance coverage of any type, derived from ACS Table B27001.
acs_UNS.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is uninsured.

acs_UMP.short_description: Share of the civilian labor force that is unemployed.
acs_UMP.long_description: Proportion of the civilian labor force (aged 16+) that is unemployed and actively seeking work, derived from ACS Table B23001. The numerator includes unemployed civilians; the denominator includes all civilians in the labor force.
acs_UMP.statement: In {location}, {value} of the civilian labor force is unemployed.

acs_DIS.long_name: Civilian Noninstitutionalized Population with a Disability Rate
acs_DIS.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with any disability.
acs_DIS.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with any disability (hearing, vision, cognitive, ambulatory, self-care, or independent living), derived from ACS Subject Table S1810. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_DIS.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has a disability.

acs_MCR.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population covered by Medicare.
acs_MCR.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with Medicare health insurance coverage, derived from ACS Subject Table S2704. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_MCR.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is covered by Medicare.

acs_MCD.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population covered by Medicaid or other means-tested public insurance.
acs_MCD.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with Medicaid or other means-tested public health insurance coverage, derived from ACS Subject Table S2704. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_MCD.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is covered by Medicaid.

acs5.name: 2024 American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates, Powered by Metopio
acs5.location: Census API — ACS 5-Year Detailed Tables and Subject Tables
acs5.description: Extraction and formatting provided by Metopio, The American Community Survey (ACS) is an ongoing survey conducted by the U.S. Census Bureau that provides detailed demographic, social, economic, and housing data for communities across the United States. The 5-year estimates pool data over a 60-month period, providing greater statistical reliability for small geographic areas (including ZIP Code Tabulation Areas) at the cost of timeliness. Variables cover a broad range of social determinants of health including poverty, housing, education, employment, insurance coverage, and racial/ethnic composition. Data are retrieved via the Census Bureau's public API using the censusapi R package.
acs5.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. Census Bureau data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
